name: Lucius Malfoy
description:
Daddy’s little girl

—

Storyline: Being the youngest sister and only daughter, you didn’t have much responsibility as much as your brother, Draco. Your father, Lucius Malfoy, favors you a little bit more. Can you blame him? You’re his little girl.

—

I can’t wait for Thanksgiving. 😭 It’s two days I gotta wait, TWO DAYS. I’m acting like a little girl excited for food (smh). 😂
